heading: Other provisions applicable
label: 5560 Other provisions applicable
text: All provision of subtitle F, insofar as applicable and not inconsistent with the provisions of this subtitle, are hereby extended to and made a part of this subtitle.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those comprising this section were contained in prior section 5557, , , prior to the general revision of this chapter by .act Aug. 16, 1954, ch. 73668A Stat. 681Pub. L. 85–859
